title: Darker Folliage leaves and woods
description: Alternative design for Leaves, animated grass, and woods.
body:
![Darker Folliage](https://i.imgur.com/jGnUqqv.png)
This texturepack replace the next woods on minecraft:

1. Oak
2. Dark Oak
3. Spruce
4. Cherry
5. Birch
6. Jungle
7. Mangrove
8. Acacia
9. Pale garden
10. Warped
11. Crimson

Aslo replace al the pranks, buttoms, fences, trapdoors and stripped logs has been changed.
